allow: Bash(timeout 10 bash -c 'while ! curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3099/api/volume-explosion 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('=== 기본 정보 ==='\)
print\(f\\"todayDate: {data.get\('todayDate'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"yesterdayDate: {data.get\('yesterdayDate'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"marketOpen: {data.get\('marketOpen'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"updatedAt: {data.get\('updatedAt'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"\\\\n=== 어제 종목 수 ===\\"\)
ys = data.get\('yesterdayStocks', []\)
print\(f\\"yesterdayStocks 총 개수: {len\(ys\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"\\\\n=== 폭발 종목 수 ===\\"\)
es = data.get\('explosionStocks', []\)
print\(f\\"explosionStocks 총 개수: {len\(es\)}\\"\)
if es:
    print\(f\\"\\\\n=== 폭발 종목 상위 5개 ===\\"\)
    for s in es[:5]:
        y_val = s.get\('yesterdayValue', 0\)
        t_val = s.get\('todayValue', 0\)
        ratio = t_val / y_val if y_val > 0 else 0
        print\(f\\"  {s['name']} \({s['code']}\) - 어제: {y_val/1e8:.0f}억 → 오늘: {t_val/1e8:.0f}억 \({ratio:.1f}배\) 등락률: {s.get\('changeRate', 0\)}%\\"\)
if ys:
    print\(f\\"\\\\n=== 어제 종목 상위 5개 ===\\"\)
    for s in ys[:5]:
        print\(f\\"  {s['name']} \({s['code']}\) - 거래대금: {s.get\('value', 0\)/1e8:.0f}억\\"\)
" 2>&1)
